channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Avs GM MacFarland felt 'timing was right' to deal star forward Mikko Rantanen
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Facing the prospect of Mikko Rantanen becoming an unrestricted free agent after this season, Colorado general manager Chris MacFarland felt the timing was right to trade the star forward and bolster the Avalanche's roster for the future.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: The New York Jets' lengthy searches are over, and they're pairing a first-time general manager with a first-time head coach to try to turn things around. Denver Broncos assistant general manager Darren Mougey agreed to terms Saturday with the Jets to become their GM.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK JR., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Riley Gaines tears into WNBA star, who gave Caitlin Clark black eye, for wearing anti-Trump shirt
item.description: Podcast host Riley Gaines jumped in on the backlash against WNBA player DiJonai Carrington after Carrington wore an anti-Trump shirt Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: Kearny 67, Morse 53
item.description: The Komets were able to take down the Tigers tonight on Morse's homecourt, 67-53, as Kearny was led by Guards Caleb Fluhr and Julian Valladerez.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Zach Ertz returns to Philadelphia for the NFC title game as a key player for the Commanders
item.description: ASHBURN, Va. (AP) — The thought invaded Zach Ertz's mind late in 2023 when he was out of football and a year removed from knee surgery. He wasn't ready to retire, but he was worried about something. “Are you still the same player?” he wondered to himself.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Commanders owner Dan Snyder 'hates' seeing team one win away from Super Bowl: report
item.description: As the Washington Commanders are on the cusp of their first Super Bowl appearance since 1991, ex-owner Dan Snyder reportedly "f---ing hates" seeing their success without him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brignone beats Goggia for Italian 1-2 in World Cup downhill. Vonn misses gate and does not finish
item.description: GARMISCH-PARTENKIRCHEN, Germany (AP) — Federica Brignone edged out teammate Sofia Goggia by the smallest possible margin for an Italian 1-2 finish in a women’s World Cup downhill on Saturday, while Lindsey Vonn missed a gate near the bottom of the course and failed to finish.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors, Lakers set for another Steph Curry-LeBron James matchup a month after Christmas classic
item.description: Saturday is the 53rd meeting between Curry and James, including the postseason. It’s as shiny a head-to-head billing as the league has ever seen, and there don't appear to be a ton of matchups left.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Australian Open: Aryna Sabalenka throws her racket after losing to Madison Keys in the final
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Aryna Sabalenka threw her racket on the sideline. She sat on her bench with a towel over her head.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes crushed by #7 Houston, 70-36
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Riding a three-game winning streak, the Runnin' Utes had gained some confidence the last couple of weeks. But Wednesday night against #7 Houston, the Utes came crashing back down to Earth. Milos Uzan scored 14 points, L.J. Cryer added 13 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PGA Tour looking to move 2025 Genesis Invitational to Torrey Pines
item.description: The tournament was scheduled to take place from Feb. 13 to 16 at The Riviera Country Club, which is in the Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card
item.description: Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Chilean nationals arrested, linked to Joe Burrow home burglary
item.description: An SUV search reportedly found "an old LSU shirt and Bengals hat believed to have been stolen" from the incident.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Red Rocks win Best of Utah as Smith wins all-around
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #5 Red Rocks broke out in a big way on Monday night at the Maverik Center, posting a 197.950 to win the Best of Utah meet and tying Oklahoma for the highest score in the nation this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz blow 25-point lead in overtime loss to Pelicans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) - CJ McCollum scored six of his 45 points in overtime and the New Orleans Pelicans orchestrated the largest comeback in franchise history, overcoming a 25-point deficit to beat Utah Jazz 123-119 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WGN 9

item.title: Almost a dozen Chicagoland natives are on the rosters for the teams playing in Monday's CFP Championship Game
item.description: Nearly a dozen Chicagoland natives will have a chance to win a College Football Playoff championship on Monday night in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: CMU Softball ready to chase another dominant season in 2025
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— After a record-breaking 2024 campaign that ended in postseason disappointment, the Colorado Mesa University softball team is gearing up for another dominant season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
